title: Zero-to-Deploy Session State
description: The orchestrator's entire persistent memory for one pipeline run.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline session.

idea.description: The user's one-line idea that initiated the pipeline.

branch.description: Git branch name created by Layer 0. Null before L0 starts.

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number. Null before PR creation.

error.description: Error description when status is FAILED.

project_root.description: Relative path to the active project directory.

subagent_id.description: Task subagent ID for resume. Null before dispatch.

bootstrap_completed.description: True after REPO_BOOTSTRAP successfully pushed initial main. Distinguishes first-run vs resume-against-existing-app.

bootstrap_scratch_path.description: Filesystem path of the bootstrap scratch dir (for debugging; safe to delete after push succeeds).

phase.description: Current WithoutCTO phase (1-7). Null before start.

tests_count.description: Total number of tests created by Layer 0.

files_changed_count.description: Total number of files changed by Layer 0.

summary.description: 2-3 line implementation summary from the subagent.

human_reviewers.description: GitHub logins that submitted APPROVED review (non-bot, non-author). Populated before MERGE_GATE; orchestrator refuses merge if empty.

merge_block_reason.description: Set when status is MERGE_GATE_BLOCKED. Human-readable reason (e.g. 'no human CODEOWNERS approval').

local_fix_iterations.description: Count of local fix-and-push cycles after a CI failure. Incremented each time the orchestrator resumes from L1_FAILED, applies a fix in the same Claude Code session, and re-pushes. Soft cap = 5 (informational; not schema-enforced).

failure_summary.description: Condensed failure description when checks fail after auto-fix budget.

failure_log_snippet.description: Last ~80 lines of the first failing required check (gh run view --log-failed), for RCA.

staging_run_id.description: GitHub Actions run ID for deploy-staging.yml.

prod_run_id.description: GitHub Actions run ID for deploy-production.yml.

prod_approval_waiting_since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the prod run entered GitHub environment 'waiting' state. Used for 1h timeout on L2_PROD_AWAITING_APPROVAL.

prod_approver.description: GitHub login of the reviewer who approved the production deployment via environment protection. Distinct from the orchestrator CTO (prevent_self_review).

artifact_signature_verified.description: True after cosign verify-blob succeeds on the AAB/backend artifact before Railway push. Required for prod_status pass.

phase5_debate.description: True after CTO confirms expert-debate tiebreak (when gate phase5 was used).

checkStatus.description: Status of a CI check run category.

deployStatus.description: Status of a deploy workflow run.
